curation_notes: The patch adds a single line enabling FEATURE_SECURE_PROCESSING on the SchemaFactory in getValidatingXmlParser within XMLUtils.java. Only one source file was changed. The location was derived directly from the patch diff. A second commit (f44e693) with the same change and same parent exists as a cherry-pick. No sibling files in the util directory share the same vulnerability pattern. Re-curated to differentiate L3 hints from L1/L2 and updated snapshot date.
